title: Background.
story: AI has made individuals faster, but it hasn't moved organizations — 95% see no real return yet. monday's AI Work Platform puts people and agents in the same place, as one team — sharing context, communicating with each other the way a real team does, and working toward the same outcome.
highlight: AI finally compounds for the whole team, not just the individual who is using it.

carousel.caption: Most organizations still haven't seen real return from AI.
